_note: Candidate task universe for the session planner. Scoring inputs per knowledge/planning/scoring-model.md. reward_base=R (0-5), urgency=U, time_blocks=T (15-min blocks), enjoyment_key -> E table in plan.py. gate = how the planner detects 'already done this reset' (needs PlannerState addon dump for the ones the profile API can't see). gate type 'event_active' {match:'<substr>'} is the fun radar: reads the addon's calendar[] block (schema>=2) and keeps the candidate ONLY while a HOLIDAY whose title contains <substr> is active now — it drops (gate 'done') when the event isn't live, and shows (?) on a pre-calendar dump. OPTIONAL breakpoint = { type:'vault', track:'mplus'|'raid'|'dungeon'|'world'|'pvp', thresholds:[1,4,8] }: when live dump state is present, plan.py's breakpoint_R() overrides R to 4 for the run that CROSSES the next threshold and to 0 once the track is capped (scoring-model.md 'breakpoint proximity'). track 'mplus' reads mythicPlus thisWeek count; other tracks read vault.slots[type].progress. Only mplus-vault is tagged so far (delve/raid await confirmation of how Midnight delves feed vault columns). Tune freely.
